text.value: Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Was the client referred to the health facility for NCD?
Please press the button below to capture GPS
Ask the client what type of illness they are suffering from.
Je mgonjwa wa pumu amewahi kufika kituo cha afya kupata matibabu?
Toa elimu ya afya kuhusu ugonjwa wa Pumu
Je mgonjwa anatumia dawa za pumu?
Mgonjwa anahudhuria kliniki kupata huduma za shinikizo la damu
Mgonjwa anahudhuria kikundi kupata huduma za shinikizo la damu kwa wakati
Mgonjwa hahudhurii kliniki wala kikundi maalum kwa matibabu ya shinikizo la damu
Je unahudhuria kituo cha afya au kikundi maalumu?
kipimo kinatakiwa kiwe kati ya 0 na 50
Andika kipimo cha sukari baada ya kula (mmol/l)
kipimo kinatakiwa kiwe kati ya 0 na 50
Andika kipimo cha sukari kabla ya kula (mmol/l)
Tafadhali ingiza shinikizo la damu kwa muundo sahihi (mfano: 120/80 au 90/60).
Andika kipimo cha shinikizo la damu
Toa elimu ya afya kuhusu ugonjwa wa Saratani.
Je mteja anapata matibabu ya saratani?
Je hali ya mgonjwa wa kisukari inaendelea vizuri?
Je mgonjwa amewahi kufika kituo cha afya kupata huduma ya seli mundu siku za karibuni?
Toa elimu ya afya kuhusu ugonjwa wa kisukari
Je mgonjwa anatumia dawa za kisukari?
Je umempima mteja urefu ili kupata kielelezo cha uwiano wa mwili (BMI)
Je mgonjwa umempima kiwango cha sukari kwenye damu?
Je umempima mteja sukari baada ya kula?
Je umempima mteja sukari kabla ya kula?
Je mteja umempima shinikizo la damu?
Dawa za tiba asili na mbadala
Mteja ana uzito wa kawaida
Mteja ana uzito kupita kiasi
NI mara ya kwanza kujigundua kua ni mgonjwa wa shinikizo la damu
Naishi mbali na kituo cha Afya
Je mgonjwa umempa rufaa kwa maradhi yasiyo ambukiza?
Dawa za tiba asili na mbadala
Dawa za tiba asili na mbadala
Dawa za tiba asili na mbadala
Toa elimu ya afya kuhusu ugonjwa wa Seli mundu
Je mgonjwa anatumia dawa za seli mundu?
Toa elimu kuhusu chakula na lishe bora
Je mgonjwa amewahi kufika kituo cha afya kupata huduma siku za karibuni?
Je ulitumia dawa za shinikizo la damu ?
Tafadhali bonyeza kitufe kilichopo chini ili kuchukua GPS
Mteja ana uzito wa chini
Je umempima mteja uzito ili kupata kielelezo cha uwiano wa mwili (BMI)

bind.relevant: /ncd/ncd/bmi_value > 0 and selected( /ncd/ncd/height_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/weight_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/type_of_illness ,"high_bp")
/ncd/ncd/bmi_value < 18.5 and selected( /ncd/ncd/height_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/weight_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/type_of_illness ,"high_bp")

/ncd/ncd/bmi_value >= 18.5 and /ncd/ncd/bmi_value <= 24.9 and selected( /ncd/ncd/height_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/weight_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/type_of_illness ,"high_bp")

/ncd/ncd/bmi_value >= 25 and /ncd/ncd/bmi_value < 30 and selected( /ncd/ncd/height_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/weight_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/type_of_illness ,"high_bp")
/ncd/ncd/bmi_value >= 30 and selected( /ncd/ncd/height_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/weight_measurement ,"yes") and selected( /ncd/ncd/type_of_illness ,"high_bp")
